metadata.name: Assembly Line Stoppage due to Robot Fault

description: A welding robot on the main assembly line has faulted, causing a line stoppage. A production manager must resolve the issue.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the automated alert from the line monitoring system, identifying the specific robot and fault code.

expected_outcome.value: Agent acknowledges the alert for 'Robot WR-07' with fault 'Servo Overheat'.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch the on-site robotics maintenance team to the robot's location.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully dispatches the maintenance team via the internal system.

nodes.task_description: Check the estimated downtime and adjust the daily production target accordingly.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives a 30-minute ETA, calculates the production impact, and updates the daily target.
